name: DOEH Commerce Storefront
description: The storefront flow over the DOEH Commerce connector: a product fixture, a session cart, and the shop → cart → checkout → order routes that call doeh_commerce()->createOrder(). It ships default templates so it works standalone, and a theme may override theme.<active>.commerce.{shop,cart,order} to own the presentation. A theme may declare fulfillment_types (pickup/delivery/dine_in) in its manifest to collect the customer's fulfilment preference at checkout — a preference only; fulfilment execution stays with DOEH. Depends on the DOEH Commerce connector.
description_mm: DOEH Commerce connector အပေါ်ရှိ storefront flow — product fixture၊ session cart နှင့် doeh_commerce()->createOrder() ကိုခေါ်သော shop → cart → checkout → order routes များ။ default template များပါဝင်၍ တစ်ခုတည်း အလုပ်လုပ်ပြီး theme က theme.<active>.commerce.{shop,cart,order} ကို override လုပ်၍ presentation ကို ပိုင်နိုင်သည်။ DOEH Commerce connector လိုအပ်သည်။
author: Beyond Plus

settings.name: products_json
settings.label: Storefront products

fields.name: sku
fields.label: SKU (must exist in your DOEH catalog)

settings.help: The products the storefront shows. SKUs must exist in the DOEH catalog for the shop the connector's key belongs to (in the sandbox, D-001 works). The price hint is display-only — DOEH computes the real total at checkout.
